<w:tcPr><w:tcW w:w="0" w:type="auto"/><w:vAlign w:val="center"/><w:hideMark/></w:tcPr><w:p w14:paraId="6613A294" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Routes, Warehouses, Destinations
<w:trPr><w:tblCellSpacing w:w="15" w:type="dxa"/></w:trPr><w:tc><w:tcPr><w:tcW w:w="0" w:type="auto"/><w:vAlign w:val="center"/><w:hideMark/></w:tcPr><w:p w14:paraId="31862873" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Delivery
<w:tcPr><w:tcW w:w="0" w:type="auto"/><w:vAlign w:val="center"/><w:hideMark/></w:tcPr><w:p w14:paraId="02CA8605" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Deliveries, Packages, History
<w:trPr><w:tblCellSpacing w:w="15" w:type="dxa"/></w:trPr><w:tc><w:tcPr><w:tcW w:w="0" w:type="auto"/><w:vAlign w:val="center"/><w:hideMark/></w:tcPr><w:p w14:paraId="1B85A860" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Analytics
<w:tcPr><w:tcW w:w="0" w:type="auto"/><w:vAlign w:val="center"/><w:hideMark/></w:tcPr><w:p w14:paraId="719926D1" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Reports, Snapshots, Dashboard Metrics
No module should directly modify another module's data.
123. Frontend Data Lifecycle
Example:
Page Loads
↓
Loading State
↓
API Request
↓
Backend Response
↓
Store Local State
↓
Render UI
↓
User Interaction
↓
Update State
↓
Re-render Component
The lifecycle should remain predictable.
124. Shared Layout Architecture
All feature modules reuse the same layout.
App
↓
MainLayout
│
├
──
 Sidebar
├
──
 Header
└── Module Content
The Sidebar and Header remain consistent across:
Dashboard 
Fleet 
Route 
Delivery 
Analytics 
125. Navigation Flow
Login
↓
Dashboard
↓
Fleet
↓
Route
↓
Delivery
↓
Analytics
↓
Logout
Navigation is controlled by React Router.
126. Component Communication Rules
Components should communicate using:
Props 
Callback functions 
Context (only when required) 
Avoid:
Deep prop drilling 
Global state for temporary UI data 
Direct sibling communication 
127. Service Layer Communication
Every module contains its own service layer.
FleetService
RouteService
DeliveryService
AnalyticsService
Services communicate with the shared Axios client.
128. Shared Axios Client
The application uses one Axios instance.
Responsibilities:
Base URL 
JWT token attachment 
Request timeout 
Error handling 
Response normalization 
All services reuse this client.
129. State Synchronization
Examples:
When a drone is assigned:
Fleet updates availability.
↓
Delivery updates assignment.
↓
Analytics refreshes utilization.
The synchronization occurs through backend APIs rather than shared frontend state.
130. Loading State Strategy
Each module manages its own loading state.
Examples:
Fleet Loading
Route Loading
Delivery Loading
Analytics Loading
Global loading should only be used during application initialization.
131. Error State Strategy
Each module manages independent errors.
Examples:
Fleet Error
Route Error
Delivery Error
Analytics Error
Global errors should only be used for authentication or application-wide failures.
132. Performance Guidelines
State management should:
Keep global state minimal. 
Avoid unnecessary context updates. 
Memoize expensive computations. 
Prevent excessive re-renders. 
Fetch only required data. 
Cache static reference data when appropriate. 
These practices improve responsiveness.
133. State Security
Sensitive information stored in global state:
JWT 
User Profile 
Role 
Sensitive information should never include:
Passwords 
Password hashes 
Database credentials 
Internal server details 
134. React Best Practices
The application should use:
Functional Components 
Hooks 
Context API 
Memoization (React.memo, useMemo, useCallback) where appropriate 
Controlled Components 
Custom Hooks 
Avoid unnecessary state duplication.
135. State Management Quality Checklist
Before implementation, verify:
Global state minimized. 
Context Providers implemented. 
Local state isolated. 
Unidirectional data flow maintained. 
Shared Axios client configured. 
Services separated by module. 
Authentication centralized. 
Notifications globally available. 
Layout reused consistently. 
136. Locked State Management Rules
The following decisions are permanently locked for Version 1.0.
Global State
Context API 
Authentication 
Notifications 
Local State
Feature-specific 
Module-owned 
Component-controlled 
Communication
Service Layer 
Shared Axios Client 
REST APIs 
Unidirectional Data Flow 
Architecture
Shared Layout 
Shared Sidebar 
Shared Header 
Feature-based Modules 
Independent State Ownership 
These rules define the application's state management architecture and must not be modified without updating the system specification.
137. End of Section Statement
This section establishes the complete state management and application data flow architecture for the Drone Delivery Navigation System.
It defines:
Global vs Local State 
Context API usage 
Module ownership 
Data flow 
Component communication 
Cross-module interaction 
Shared services 
Performance optimization 
Security considerations 
Together with the previous sections, this provides a complete blueprint for how information flows across the entire application while maintaining modularity, scalability, and maintainability.
End of Volume 7 – Section 5

Project Organization Philosophy

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>@/modules/fleet/components/DroneCard

File Responsibility Rules
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Each file should have a single purpose.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Examples:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Component → UI 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Hook → Reusable logic 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Service → API communication 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Repository → Database operations 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Controller → HTTP handling 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Utility → Pure helper functions 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Avoid mixing responsibilities.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="2F3509AB"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14010" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="2B68E93A" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t>165. <w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>SECTION 1
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Project Overview, Executive Summary & Complete System Introduction
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="0B7BE3F7"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14913" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="5D4D984B" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Cover Statement
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">The 
Drone Delivery Navigation System
 is a full-stack web application designed to simulate and manage a modern drone-based logistics network. The system integrates 
Fleet Management
, 
Route Optimization
, 
Delivery Management
, and 
Analytics Dashboard
 into a unified platform, providing a realistic representation of how autonomous delivery systems can be monitored and controlled.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">The project is developed using the 
MERN Stack
 with 
TypeScript
, while incorporating multiple 
Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA)
 such as Arrays, Searching, Sorting, Graphs, Breadth-First Search (BFS), Dijkstra's Algorithm, Queue, Priority Queue, Hash Maps, Prefix Sum, and Aggregation Algorithms.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The objective is to demonstrate practical software engineering, modular architecture, efficient algorithm implementation, and modern web development practices within a single enterprise-style application.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="2AE521D8"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14914" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="52064400" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>1. Executive Summary
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System addresses the growing demand for efficient and intelligent delivery management by providing a centralized platform for monitoring drone fleets, generating optimized delivery routes, scheduling deliveries, and analyzing operational performance.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The project combines:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Modern frontend development 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Secure backend architecture 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Database management 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Algorithmic problem solving 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Responsive user experience 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Enterprise software engineering principles 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Instead of functioning as a simple CRUD application, the system demonstrates how software architecture and DSA work together to solve real-world logistics problems.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="33502E44"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14915" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="548FC843" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>2. Project Vision
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The long-term vision of this project is to provide a scalable software foundation capable of supporting future drone logistics platforms.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Version 1.0 focuses on simulation and operational management, while future versions can evolve into real-world systems by integrating:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Live GPS tracking 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Weather services 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Drone telemetry 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Real-time communication 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Autonomous fleet coordination 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Cloud deployment 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Mobile applications 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The architecture has been intentionally designed to support these future enhancements without major structural changes.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="260BB588"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14916" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="3ED36612" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>3. Problem Statement
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Modern logistics operations involve numerous challenges:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Managing multiple delivery drones 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Selecting efficient delivery routes 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Avoiding restricted areas 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t xml:space="preserve">Scheduling deliveries based on priority 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Monitoring fleet availability 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Measuring operational efficiency 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Traditional manual management becomes increasingly inefficient as fleet size and delivery volume grow.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System provides a centralized software solution that simplifies these operations through automation and intelligent algorithms.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="2A3FD92E"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14917" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="1FB293A7" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>4. Proposed Solution
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The proposed solution is a modular web application consisting of four major operational modules:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Fleet Management
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Manages drone inventory, availability, maintenance status, and fleet statistics.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="6E7B8B15"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14918" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="1E204DEC" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Route Optimization
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Uses graph algorithms to calculate optimized routes between warehouses and destinations while considering operational constraints.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="14938883"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14919" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="779C7ADE" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Delivery Management
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Schedules deliveries, assigns drones and routes, prioritizes delivery requests, and tracks delivery progress.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="7AE8C202"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14920" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="5ADC04B4" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Analytics Dashboard
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Transforms operational data into meaningful KPIs, charts, reports, and historical trends for business decision-making.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Together, these modules form a complete logistics management platform.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="4E67BE50"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14921" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="7A8DB62A" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>5. Project Objectives
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The project aims to achieve the following objectives:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Functional Objectives
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Centralize fleet operations. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Optimize delivery routes. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Automate delivery assignment. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Monitor delivery lifecycle. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t xml:space="preserve">Generate operational analytics. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="7CFCD900"><v:rect id="_x0000_i14922" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="31C97EB6" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Technical Objectives

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Demonstrate implementation of:

Project Scope
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Included in Version 1.0

Benefits of the System
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System offers:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Improved operational visibility 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Better delivery planning 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Efficient resource utilization 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Faster route generation 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Centralized management 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Performance monitoring 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Modular architecture 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Easy future expansion 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>These benefits make the system suitable as both an academic project and a foundation for future development.

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Documentation is complete. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">The system is deployable.

End of Section Statement

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="7505B668"><v:rect id="_x0000_i15791" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="6C1F8606" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>51. Purpose
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System is organized into four major functional modules.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Each module has a clearly defined responsibility while working together to achieve the overall objective of efficient drone delivery management.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>This section summarizes:

Purpose
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System Version 1.0 establishes a strong foundation for autonomous logistics management.

Future Vision
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The long-term vision is to transform the project into a complete enterprise drone logistics ecosystem capable of supporting:

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Show backend architecture.

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Explain why each feature exists.

<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="02366F82"><v:rect id="_x0000_i17026" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="3A633337" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>PART A — Project Overview
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Q1. What is your project?
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Answer:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>The Drone Delivery Navigation System is a full-stack web application that simulates a modern drone logistics platform. It manages drone fleets, optimizes delivery routes, schedules deliveries, and provides operational analytics using the MERN stack and multiple Data Structures & Algorithms.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="7D60854C"><v:rect id="_x0000_i17027" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="3B59D41D" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Q2. Why did you choose this project?
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Answer:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>I wanted to build a project that combines full-stack development with practical applications of Data Structures and Algorithms. Drone logistics is a growing field, making it an ideal real-world use case.
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="7AE6A1DB"><v:rect id="_x0000_i17028" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="349AE6C9" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>Q3. What problem does your project solve?
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t>Answer:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>It provides a centralized platform for managing drone fleets, optimizing routes, scheduling deliveries, and analyzing operational performance, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

Final Viva Preparation Tips
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t>Before your viva:
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Understand the architecture instead of memorizing answers. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Be able to explain why each DSA algorithm was chosen. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Know the purpose of every module. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Practice drawing the architecture on paper. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Be comfortable explaining API flow and database relationships. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Be honest if asked about future improvements—explain what is implemented in Version 1.0 and what is planned for later. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="433FCFBB"><v:rect id="_x0000_i17098" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="02916C52" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:lastRenderedPageBreak/><w:t>131. Common Mistakes to Avoid
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Confusing 
authentication
 with 
authorization
. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Saying MongoDB is relational. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Claiming Dijkstra works with negative edge weights. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Forgetting why a particular DSA was chosen. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Saying React is a framework (it's a library). 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:t xml:space="preserve">Mixing frontend responsibilities with backend responsibilities. 
<w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:pict w14:anchorId="021107FD"><v:rect id="_x0000_i17099" style="width:0;height:1.5pt" o:hralign="center" o:hrstd="t" o:hr="t" fillcolor="#a0a0a0" stroked="f"/></w:pict></w:r></w:p><w:p w14:paraId="40BD05AC" w14:textId="77777777" w:rsidR="006670E2" w:rsidRPr="006670E2" w:rsidRDefault="006670E2" w:rsidP="006670E2"><w:pPr><w:tabs><w:tab w:val="left" w:pos="1284"/></w:tabs><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr></w:pPr><w:r w:rsidRPr="006670E2"><w:rPr><w:b/><w:bCs/></w:rPr><w:t>132. End of Section Statement
